original_image_tags: A technical graph labeled "Figure 21. Atlas IIAS All-Mode Ship-Hit Contours with A = 6.30". The chart plots "Crossrange Distance (nm)" on the y-axis (ranging from -15 to 15) against "Downrange Distance (nm)" on the x-axis (ranging from -5 to 25). The title area inside the graph reads "Atlas IIAS" and "All Mode Pi". A legend indicates three contour lines corresponding to probability values: a solid line for 10^-4, a dashed line for 10^-5, and a dotted line for 10^-6. The contours originate near 0,0 and expand outwards. Text inside the graph area specifies "B = 5,000,000" and "A = 6.30".

elements.description: A 2D plot labeled 'Atlas IIAS' and 'All Mode P_I' with axes labeled 'Downrange Distance (nm)' and 'Crossrange Distance (nm)'. The plot displays contour lines representing three probability levels: 10^-4 (solid), 10^-5 (dashed), and 10^-6 (dotted). Inside the plot, a label reads 'B = 5,000,000' and 'A = 6.30'. Below the plot, the caption reads 'Figure 21. Atlas IIAS All-Mode Ship-Hit Contours with A = 6.30'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on all visual elements: a 2D contour plot with identical axis labels, contour line types, probability values, internal text labels, and caption.
